title: 「Not so much A as B」句型
titleZh: 「Not so much A as B」表示「與其說是 A，不如說是 B」
titleEn: Using Not so much A as B for a more accurate emphasis

source.file: Sentence Structure 114 -「Not so much A as B」表示「與其說是 A，不如說是 B」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + be + not so much + A + as + B

formulas.formula: Subject + be + not so much + A + as + B
Subject + do / does / did + not so much + base verb A + as + base verb B
Subject + verb + not so much + A + as + B

example: The issue is not so much cost as timing.
exampleZh: 問題與其說是成本，不如說是時機。

examples.en: The issue is not so much cost as timing.
examples.zh: 問題與其說是成本，不如說是時機。
examples.highlight: not so much cost as timing

meaning.zh: Not so much A as B 不一定完全否定 A，而是指出 B 更準確、更重要或更接近真正原因。

rules.zh: B 是更準確或更重要的重點；A 可能有一點道理，但 B 更接近真正原因。
rules.en: B is the more accurate or important point; A may contain some truth, but B is closer to the real reason.
examples: The trip was not so much tiring as boring.

rules.zh: A 和 B 應使用相同或相近的平行文法形式，例如名詞配名詞、形容詞配形容詞。
rules.en: A and B should use the same or closely parallel grammatical form, such as noun + noun or adjective + adjective.
examples: The problem is not so much money as time.
He was not so much angry as disappointed.

rules.zh: 目標結構使用 as，不使用 but 或 than。
rules.en: Use as in the target structure, not but or than.
examples: not so much A as B

rules.zh: 有介詞時通常在兩部分重複介詞，使 A 和 B 的結構更清楚。
rules.en: When a preposition is needed, normally repeat it in both parts to keep A and B structurally clear.
examples: The debate is not so much about who is right as about what should happen next.

rules.zh: 動作動詞通常使用 do、does 或 did；情態動詞亦可直接置於 not so much 前。
rules.en: Action verbs normally use do, does or did; a modal verb may also appear directly before not so much.
examples: The advertisement does not so much provide information as create excitement.
The policy may not so much reduce costs as move them elsewhere.

rules.zh: Not A but B 較直接否定 A；not so much A as B 語氣較細緻，承認 A 可能有一點成立，但 B 更準確。
rules.en: Not A but B rejects A more directly; not so much A as B is subtler and allows that A may be partly true while B is more accurate.
examples: He was not angry but disappointed.
He was not so much angry as disappointed.

rules.zh: Rather than 常表示選擇、取代或偏好；not so much A as B 主要比較描述、原因或重點。
rules.en: Rather than often expresses choice, replacement or preference; not so much A as B mainly compares descriptions, causes or emphasis.
examples: We travelled by train rather than by plane.
The issue is not so much cost as timing.

benefits.zh: 可以承認 A 有一點道理，同時指出 B 才是更準確的重點，表達更細緻。
benefits.en: It lets you acknowledge that A has some truth while showing that B is the more accurate emphasis.

benefits.zh: 當事情有兩個可能原因時，能清楚突出真正原因或核心問題。
benefits.en: When two causes are possible, it clearly highlights the real cause or central issue.

benefits.zh: 可以把 A 和更重要的 B 合併在同一句，令表達更緊密。
benefits.en: It combines A and the more important B in one sentence, creating a tighter expression.

benefits.zh: 在討論、作文或報告中，能較有禮貌地修正看法，避免武斷地說 A 完全錯誤。
benefits.en: In discussion, essays or reports, it corrects a view politely without bluntly claiming that A is entirely wrong.

benefits.zh: 特別適合分析真正原因、主要問題、人物感受、政策影響、行為目的和不同解釋。
benefits.en: It is especially useful for analysing real causes, central problems, feelings, policy effects, purposes and competing explanations.

benefits.zh: 可取代反覆使用 A matters, but B matters more，使作文和口語更成熟自然。
benefits.en: It replaces repetitive wording such as A matters, but B matters more and adds a more mature, natural pattern.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using not so much A as B to show that B is more accurate, important or central than A.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 not so much A as B 改寫以下句子，表示 B 比 A 更準確、更重要，或更接近真正重點。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Cost is a concern, but timing is the main issue.
questions.promptZh: 成本是一項考慮，但時機才是主要問題。
questions.answer: The issue is not so much cost as timing.
questions.answerZh: 問題與其說是成本，不如說是時機。
questions.highlight: The issue is not so much cost as timing.

questions.prompt: She has enough ability, but she mainly lacks confidence.
questions.promptZh: 她有足夠能力，但主要欠缺自信。
questions.answer: Her difficulty is not so much a lack of ability as a lack of confidence.
questions.answerZh: 她的困難與其說是能力不足，不如說是缺乏自信。
questions.highlight: Her difficulty is not so much a lack of ability as a lack of confidence.

questions.prompt: The room is not extremely small. Its main problem is its poor organisation.
questions.promptZh: 房間並非非常細小，主要問題是佈置欠佳。
questions.answer: The problem with the room is not so much its size as its poor organisation.
questions.answerZh: 房間的問題與其說是面積，不如說是佈置欠佳。
questions.highlight: The problem with the room is not so much its size as its poor organisation.

questions.prompt: He seemed disappointed more than angry.
questions.promptZh: 他看起來失望多於憤怒。
questions.answer: His reaction was not so much anger as disappointment.
questions.answerZh: 他的反應與其說是憤怒，不如說是失望。
questions.highlight: His reaction was not so much anger as disappointment.

questions.prompt: The trip was a little tiring, but it was mainly boring.
questions.promptZh: 旅程有點令人疲累，但主要是沉悶。
questions.answer: The trip was not so much tiring as boring.
questions.answerZh: 這趟旅程與其說令人疲累，不如說令人沉悶。
questions.highlight: The trip was not so much tiring as boring.

questions.prompt: The task is not very hard; it simply takes a lot of time.
questions.promptZh: 這項任務並不太困難，只是需要很多時間。
questions.answer: This task is not so much difficult as time-consuming.
questions.answerZh: 這項任務與其說困難，不如說耗時。
questions.highlight: This task is not so much difficult as time-consuming.

questions.prompt: The film has some funny moments, but it is mainly touching.
questions.promptZh: 這部電影有一些有趣的情節，但主要是感人的。
questions.answer: The film is not so much funny as touching.
questions.answerZh: 這部電影與其說有趣，不如說感人。
questions.highlight: The film is not so much funny as touching.

questions.prompt: Bad luck played a small part, but poor planning caused most of the delay.
questions.promptZh: 運氣不好造成了一小部分影響，但大部分延誤都是規劃不善所致。
questions.answer: The delay was not so much bad luck as poor planning.
questions.answerZh: 延誤與其說是運氣不好，不如說是規劃不善。
questions.highlight: The delay was not so much bad luck as poor planning.

questions.prompt: Luck helped a little, but hard work was the main reason for their success.
questions.promptZh: 運氣提供了一點幫助，但努力才是他們成功的主要原因。
questions.answer: Their success was not so much luck as hard work.
questions.answerZh: 他們的成功與其說靠運氣，不如說靠努力。
questions.highlight: Their success was not so much luck as hard work.

questions.prompt: Grammar was included, but clear communication was the main focus of the lesson.
questions.promptZh: 課堂包括文法，但主要重點是清晰溝通。
questions.answer: The lesson was not so much about grammar as about clear communication.
questions.answerZh: 這堂課與其說是關於文法，不如說是關於清晰溝通。
questions.highlight: The lesson was not so much about grammar as about clear communication.

questions.prompt: Maya cares less about the price and more about the product’s quality.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅較少考慮價錢，更重視產品質素。
questions.answer: Maya’s concern is not so much the price as the product’s quality.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅關心的與其說是價錢，不如說是產品質素。
questions.highlight: Maya’s concern is not so much the price as the product’s quality.

questions.prompt: People expected a discussion, but the manager mainly announced a decision.
questions.promptZh: 大家原本預期會進行討論，但經理主要是宣布一項決定。
questions.answer: The meeting was not so much a discussion as an announcement.
questions.answerZh: 這次會議與其說是一場討論，不如說是一項宣布。
questions.highlight: The meeting was not so much a discussion as an announcement.

questions.prompt: He seemed rude, but nervousness explained his behaviour better.
questions.promptZh: 他看起來有點無禮，但緊張更能解釋他的行為。
questions.answer: He was not so much rude as nervous.
questions.answerZh: 他與其說是無禮，不如說是緊張。
questions.highlight: He was not so much rude as nervous.

questions.prompt: The event did not disappear from the schedule; it was moved to a later date.
questions.promptZh: 活動並沒有從日程中消失，只是被移至較後日期。
questions.answer: The event was not so much cancelled as postponed.
questions.answerZh: 活動與其說被取消，不如說被延期。
questions.highlight: The event was not so much cancelled as postponed.

questions.prompt: The change may cause some difficulty, but it offers a greater opportunity.
questions.promptZh: 這項改變可能造成一些困難，但同時帶來更大的機會。
questions.answer: The change is not so much a problem as an opportunity.
questions.answerZh: 這項改變與其說是一個問題，不如說是一個機會。
questions.highlight: The change is not so much a problem as an opportunity.

questions.prompt: The book contains a story, but it mainly brings together the writer’s memories.
questions.promptZh: 這本書包含故事，但主要是把作者的回憶集合起來。
questions.answer: The book is not so much a story as a collection of memories.
questions.answerZh: 這本書與其說是一個故事，不如說是一本回憶集。
questions.highlight: The book is not so much a story as a collection of memories.

questions.prompt: Daniel’s words sounded less like a complaint and more like a request for help.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾的說話不太像投訴，反而更像是在求助。
questions.answer: Daniel was not so much complaining as asking for help.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾與其說是在投訴，不如說是在求助。
questions.highlight: Daniel was not so much complaining as asking for help.

questions.prompt: She did not attack the whole plan; she only raised questions about one part of it.
questions.promptZh: 她沒有批評整個計劃，只是對其中一部分提出疑問。
questions.answer: She was not so much criticising the plan as questioning one part of it.
questions.answerZh: 她與其說是在批評計劃，不如說是在質疑其中一部分。
questions.highlight: She was not so much criticising the plan as questioning one part of it.

questions.prompt: The prices are not extremely low, but customers receive good value for what they pay.
questions.promptZh: 價格並非非常低，但顧客所付的金錢物有所值。
questions.answer: The shop is not so much cheap as good value for money.
questions.answerZh: 這間商店與其說價錢便宜，不如說物有所值。
questions.highlight: The shop is not so much cheap as good value for money.

questions.prompt: The rule causes trouble mainly because it is unclear, not because it is strict.
questions.promptZh: 這項規則造成問題，主要是因為內容不清楚，而不是因為太嚴格。
questions.answer: The new rule is not so much strict as unclear.
questions.answerZh: 新規則與其說嚴格，不如說內容不清楚。
questions.highlight: The new rule is not so much strict as unclear.

questions.prompt: Finding information is fairly easy. Deciding whether to trust it is the real challenge.
questions.promptZh: 尋找資料相當容易，判斷資料是否可信才是真正的挑戰。
questions.answer: The main challenge is not so much finding information as judging whether it is reliable.
questions.answerZh: 主要挑戰與其說是尋找資料，不如說是判斷資料是否可靠。
questions.highlight: The main challenge is not so much finding information as judging whether it is reliable.

questions.prompt: We can probably complete the work. The more important question is whether we can do it well.
questions.promptZh: 我們大概能完成工作，更重要的問題是能否把工作做好。
questions.answer: What we must ask is not so much whether we can finish as whether we can finish well.
questions.answerZh: 我們要問的與其說是能否完成，不如說是能否把事情做好。
questions.highlight: What we must ask is not so much whether we can finish as whether we can finish well.

questions.prompt: Deciding who is right matters less than deciding what should happen next.
questions.promptZh: 判斷誰對誰錯不及決定下一步應該怎樣做重要。
questions.answer: The debate is not so much about who is right as about what should happen next.
questions.answerZh: 爭論的重點與其說是誰對誰錯，不如說是下一步應該怎樣做。
questions.highlight: The debate is not so much about who is right as about what should happen next.

questions.prompt: Money influenced her decision a little, but family needs influenced it much more.
questions.promptZh: 金錢對她的決定有一點影響，但家庭需要的影響大得多。
questions.answer: Her decision was based not so much on money as on family needs.
questions.answerZh: 她的決定與其說是基於金錢，不如說是基於家庭需要。
questions.highlight: Her decision was based not so much on money as on family needs.

questions.prompt: The length of the instructions was a minor issue; their lack of clarity was the main problem.
questions.promptZh: 指示太長只是一個小問題，內容不清楚才是主要問題。
questions.answer: The problem was not so much that the instructions were long as that they were unclear.
questions.answerZh: 問題與其說是指示太長，不如說是指示不清楚。
questions.highlight: The problem was not so much that the instructions were long as that they were unclear.

questions.prompt: The programme’s main purpose is to prevent mistakes, although it can also punish them.
questions.promptZh: 這個計劃的主要目的是防止錯誤，雖然它亦可以懲罰犯錯者。
questions.answer: The programme was designed not so much to punish mistakes as to prevent them.
questions.answerZh: 這個計劃的設計重點與其說是懲罰錯誤，不如說是防止錯誤發生。
questions.highlight: The programme was designed not so much to punish mistakes as to prevent them.

questions.prompt: Complete beginners may benefit, but the course is mainly intended for learners who need more practice.
questions.promptZh: 完全初學者可能也會得益，但這個課程主要為需要更多練習的學習者而設。
questions.answer: The course is intended not so much for complete beginners as for learners who need more practice.
questions.answerZh: 這個課程與其說是為完全初學者而設，不如說是為需要更多練習的學習者而設。
questions.highlight: The course is intended not so much for complete beginners as for learners who need more practice.

questions.prompt: Hiring more staff may help, but better communication is what the team needs most.
questions.promptZh: 聘請更多員工可能有幫助，但團隊最需要的是更好的溝通。
questions.answer: What the team needs is not so much more staff as better communication.
questions.answerZh: 團隊需要的與其說是更多員工，不如說是更好的溝通。
questions.highlight: What the team needs is not so much more staff as better communication.

questions.prompt: Speed contributed a little, but poor visibility was the main cause of the accident.
questions.promptZh: 車速造成了一點影響，但能見度低才是意外的主要原因。
questions.answer: The accident resulted not so much from speed as from poor visibility.
questions.answerZh: 這宗意外與其說是由車速造成，不如說是由能見度低造成。
questions.highlight: The accident resulted not so much from speed as from poor visibility.

questions.prompt: Large companies are affected, but small local businesses feel the greater impact.
questions.promptZh: 大型公司受到影響，但本地小型企業受到的影響更大。
questions.answer: The policy affects not so much large companies as small local businesses.
questions.answerZh: 這項政策影響的與其說是大型公司，不如說是本地小型企業。
questions.highlight: The policy affects not so much large companies as small local businesses.

questions.prompt: The manager did not refuse the proposal completely. She put off making a decision.
questions.promptZh: 經理沒有完全拒絕建議，只是延遲作出決定。
questions.answer: The manager did not so much reject the proposal as delay the decision.
questions.answerZh: 經理與其說是拒絕建議，不如說是延遲作出決定。
questions.highlight: The manager did not so much reject the proposal as delay the decision.

questions.prompt: Leo remembered the appointment, but he thought it was at a different time.
questions.promptZh: 里奧記得有這個約會，但他以為約會是在另一個時間。
questions.answer: Leo did not so much forget the appointment as misunderstand the time.
questions.answerZh: 里奧與其說是忘記約會，不如說是誤解了約會時間。
questions.highlight: Leo did not so much forget the appointment as misunderstand the time.

questions.prompt: The speech mainly strengthened their existing beliefs rather than giving them new ones.
questions.promptZh: 這場演講主要加強了他們原有的信念，而不是令他們產生新的想法。
questions.answer: The speech did not so much change their minds as confirm what they already believed.
questions.answerZh: 這場演講與其說改變了他們的想法，不如說確認了他們原本相信的事情。
questions.highlight: The speech did not so much change their minds as confirm what they already believed.

questions.prompt: The problem returned after a few days, so the repair only hid it temporarily.
questions.promptZh: 問題幾天後再次出現，因此那次維修只是一時把問題隱藏起來。
questions.answer: The repair did not so much solve the problem as hide it for a few days.
questions.answerZh: 這次維修與其說解決了問題，不如說把問題隱藏了幾天。
questions.highlight: The repair did not so much solve the problem as hide it for a few days.

questions.prompt: The advertisement gives a few facts, but its main purpose is to make people excited.
questions.promptZh: 這則廣告提供了一些資料，但主要目的是令觀眾感到興奮。
questions.answer: The advertisement does not so much provide information as create excitement.
questions.answerZh: 這則廣告與其說是提供資料，不如說是營造興奮感。
questions.highlight: The advertisement does not so much provide information as create excitement.

questions.prompt: Ms Wong avoided stating the answer directly and instead helped the students find it.
questions.promptZh: 黃老師沒有直接說出答案，而是幫助學生自行找出答案。
questions.answer: Ms Wong did not so much give the answer as guide the students towards it.
questions.answerZh: 黃老師與其說是直接給予答案，不如說是引導學生找出答案。
questions.highlight: Ms Wong did not so much give the answer as guide the students towards it.

questions.prompt: Her message contained little apology; it mainly explained her reasons.
questions.promptZh: 她的訊息沒有太多道歉，主要是在解釋自己的理由。
questions.answer: Her message did not so much apologise as explain why she acted that way.
questions.answerZh: 她的訊息與其說是在道歉，不如說是在解釋自己為何那樣做。
questions.highlight: Her message did not so much apologise as explain why she acted that way.

questions.prompt: The app can perform some teaching tasks, but its main role is to support teachers.
questions.promptZh: 這個應用程式可以執行一些教學工作，但主要作用是支援教師。
questions.answer: The new app does not so much replace teachers as support their work.
questions.answerZh: 這個新應用程式與其說是取代教師，不如說是支援教師的工作。
questions.highlight: The new app does not so much replace teachers as support their work.

questions.prompt: No solution was reached, but everyone saw more clearly how serious the problem was.
questions.promptZh: 會議沒有得出解決方法，但大家更清楚看到問題有多嚴重。
questions.answer: The meeting did not so much produce a solution as reveal the size of the problem.
questions.answerZh: 這次會議與其說得出了解決方法，不如說揭示了問題的嚴重程度。
questions.highlight: The meeting did not so much produce a solution as reveal the size of the problem.

questions.prompt: The delay will cause passengers some inconvenience, but the greater harm may be a loss of trust in the company.
questions.promptZh: 延誤會為乘客帶來一些不便，但更大的傷害可能是乘客失去對公司的信任。
questions.answer: For passengers, the greater effect of the delay may be not so much inconvenience as a loss of trust in the company.
questions.answerZh: 對乘客而言，延誤造成的較大影響與其說是不便，不如說是失去對公司的信任。
questions.highlight: For passengers, the greater effect of the delay may be not so much inconvenience as a loss of trust in the company.

questions.prompt: Both sides want the same final result; they mainly disagree about the speed of change.
questions.promptZh: 雙方都希望得到相同的最終結果，主要分歧在於改變的速度。
questions.answer: The disagreement is not so much about the final goal as about how quickly to reach it.
questions.answerZh: 雙方的分歧與其說是在於最終目標，不如說是在於應該多快達成目標。
questions.highlight: The disagreement is not so much about the final goal as about how quickly to reach it.

questions.prompt: People are less worried about the existence of the technology than about its use without clear rules.
questions.promptZh: 人們對科技本身的存在沒有那麼擔心，反而更擔心科技在缺乏清晰規則下被使用。
questions.answer: Public concern is not so much that the technology exists as that it may be used without clear rules.
questions.answerZh: 公眾擔心的與其說是這項科技的存在，不如說是它可能在缺乏清晰規則下被使用。
questions.highlight: Public concern is not so much that the technology exists as that it may be used without clear rules.

questions.prompt: Equipment is limited, but the lack of trained staff is the hospital’s greater difficulty.
questions.promptZh: 醫院的設備有限，但缺乏受過訓練的員工才是更大的困難。
questions.answer: The hospital’s difficulty is not so much a shortage of equipment as a shortage of trained staff.
questions.answerZh: 醫院的困難與其說是缺乏設備，不如說是缺乏受過訓練的員工。
questions.highlight: The hospital’s difficulty is not so much a shortage of equipment as a shortage of trained staff.

questions.prompt: The figures are useful, but the report’s greater value lies in the questions it encourages readers to ask.
questions.promptZh: 數字很有用，但報告更大的價值在於它促使讀者提出的問題。
questions.answer: The report is valuable not so much for the figures it contains as for the questions it raises.
questions.answerZh: 這份報告的價值與其說在於當中的數字，不如說在於它提出的問題。
questions.highlight: The report is valuable not so much for the figures it contains as for the questions it raises.

questions.prompt: The idea had some weaknesses, but the project mainly failed because the team had too little time to test it.
questions.promptZh: 構思有一些不足，但項目失敗的主要原因是團隊沒有足夠時間進行測試。
questions.answer: The project failed not so much because the idea was weak as because the team lacked time to test it.
questions.answerZh: 項目失敗與其說是因為構思薄弱，不如說是因為團隊缺乏時間進行測試。
questions.highlight: The project failed not so much because the idea was weak as because the team lacked time to test it.

questions.prompt: The number of study hours matters less than how effectively those hours are used.
questions.promptZh: 溫習時數不及如何有效運用這些時間重要。
questions.answer: What matters is not so much how many hours you study as how effectively you use them.
questions.answerZh: 重要的與其說是你溫習多少小時，不如說是你如何有效運用這些時間。
questions.highlight: What matters is not so much how many hours you study as how effectively you use them.

questions.prompt: Many people were willing to accept change, but they feared having no voice in the decision.
questions.promptZh: 很多人願意接受改變，但他們害怕自己無法參與決策。
questions.answer: The public response was not so much opposition to change as fear of being excluded from the decision.
questions.answerZh: 公眾的反應與其說是反對改變，不如說是害怕被排除在決策過程之外。
questions.highlight: The public response was not so much opposition to change as fear of being excluded from the decision.

questions.prompt: The coach did not mainly ask the athletes to increase their training; she stressed careful recovery.
questions.promptZh: 教練的重點不是要求運動員增加訓練，而是強調小心恢復身體。
questions.answer: The coach’s advice was not so much to train harder as to recover more carefully.
questions.answerZh: 教練的建議與其說是更努力訓練，不如說是更小心地恢復身體。
questions.highlight: The coach’s advice was not so much to train harder as to recover more carefully.

questions.prompt: The policy could appear to save money, but it may simply transfer costs from one department to another.
questions.promptZh: 這項政策表面上可能節省金錢，但實際上可能只是把成本由一個部門轉移至另一個部門。
questions.answer: This policy may not so much reduce costs as move them from one department to another.
questions.answerZh: 這項政策與其說可以減少成本，不如說可能只是把成本由一個部門轉移至另一個部門。
questions.highlight: This policy may not so much reduce costs as move them from one department to another.

questions.prompt: The system works during normal use. The more important test is whether it remains reliable when several problems occur together.
questions.promptZh: 系統在正常使用時能夠運作。更重要的考驗是當多個問題同時發生時，它能否保持可靠。
questions.answer: The real test is not so much whether the system works in normal conditions as whether it remains reliable when several problems occur at once.
questions.answerZh: 真正的考驗與其說是系統能否在正常情況下運作，不如說是當多個問題同時發生時，系統能否保持可靠。
questions.highlight: The real test is not so much whether the system works in normal conditions as whether it remains reliable when several problems occur at once.
